titles.title: A bill to prohibit the use of the name, image, likeness, or signature of a sitting President on Federal assets, and for other purposes.
A bill to prohibit the use of the name, image, likeness, or signature of a sitting President on Federal assets, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.

committee.name: Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs
